title: Add a Platform Demo Hub
problem: Visitors can try individual demos, but there is no single page that explains which demo to use first.
suggestion: Create /platform/demos/ with cards for Catalyst Canvas, Catalyst Data, Analytics R, Global Impact Catalyst, Narrative Risk, Catalyst Finance, and Catalyst Grit.
success_criteria: A visitor can understand the demo ecosystem, choose the right demo, and move from the demo hub to a relevant repository or article path.
beneficiaries: New visitors, sustainability teams, students, researchers, and potential consulting clients.
implementation_notes: Use the existing Sustainable Catalyst card style and include a short explanation of each demo's purpose, maturity, and recommended use case.
